nodes.name: MeanFieldVariationalFit
nodes.description: Builds a stochastic divergence-minimization objective from prior/likelihood oracles and optimizes mean-field variational parameters as immutable variational state (latent mean and latent scale). Private objective construction helper is grouped with the optimizer entrypoint.

inputs.name: log_prior_fun
inputs.constraints: Pure log-probability oracle; no persistent state writes.

inputs.name: log_lik_fun
inputs.constraints: Pure likelihood/log-likelihood oracle; no persistent state writes.

inputs.name: constrain_fun_dict
inputs.constraints: Maps unconstrained variational coordinates to constrained parameter space.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.constraints: Explicit stochastic input; treated as immutable RNG state.

inputs.name: verbose
inputs.constraints: Logging flag only; does not alter statistical semantics.

outputs.name: free_means
outputs.constraints: Optimized latent mean parameters.

outputs.name: free_sds
outputs.constraints: Optimized latent standard deviations; strictly positive.

outputs.name: objective_fun
outputs.constraints: Pure divergence-minimization objective closure.

outputs.name: rng_state_out
outputs.constraints: Advanced RNG state returned as new immutable value.

nodes.type_signature: (theta_shape_dict: dict[str, tuple[int,...]], log_prior_fun: callable, log_lik_fun: callable, M: int, constrain_fun_dict: dict[str, callable], seed: int | PRNGKey-like RNG state, var_param_inits: dict | None, opt_method: str, verbose: bool) -> tuple[dict[str, array], dict[str, array], callable, int | PRNGKey-like RNG state]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Factorized Stochastic Surrogate Fitting. Constructs a deterministic divergence-minimization objective by combining two pure scoring oracles through Monte Carlo expectations over a factorized latent surrogate distribution. The surrogate is parameterized by per-block location and strictly positive scale in an unconstrained coordinate system, then mapped through constraint transforms before scoring. An optimizer iteratively updates these surrogate parameters while treating randomness as explicit immutable state and returning an updated random-state value.. Applications: Calibrating uncertain parameters in multiscale materials simulation from noisy sensor-derived observables, Inferring latent neural population states from high-dimensional electrophysiology recordings, Estimating hidden reaction-rate fields in chemical process digital twins under partial observations, Recovering uncertain subsurface property tensors in geophysical inverse modeling with sparse measurements

nodes.name: summarize_latent_layout
nodes.description: Builds placeholder latent tensors from shape specs and derives flatten/reconstruction metadata for a single unconstrained latent vector.

inputs.name: theta_shape_dict
inputs.constraints: Each shape is fully specified and consistent with target latent structure.

outputs.name: flat_theta_template
outputs.constraints: 1D unconstrained latent template; length defines latent_dim.

outputs.name: shape_summary
outputs.constraints: Compatible with reconstruct(..., summary, jnp.reshape).

nodes.name: prepare_stochastic_divergence_objective
nodes.description: Uses the seed to generate fixed standard-normal Monte Carlo noise and curries a stochastic divergence-minimization objective callable over model-specific components.

inputs.name: log_lik_fun
inputs.constraints: Accepts parameter dict and returns scalar log likelihood.

inputs.name: log_prior_fun
inputs.constraints: Accepts parameter dict and returns scalar log prior.

outputs.name: objective_fun
outputs.constraints: Maps flattened variational parameters to scalar objective.

outputs.name: rng_state_after_objective_init
outputs.constraints: Represents RNG progression after fixed-noise generation.

nodes.type_signature: (flat_theta_template: jnp.ndarray, shape_summary: flatten/reconstruct metadata, constrain_fun_dict: dict[str, callable], log_lik_fun: callable, log_prior_fun: callable, seed: int | PRNGKey-like RNG state, M: int) -> tuple[callable, int | PRNGKey-like RNG state]

nodes.name: initialize_variational_state
nodes.description: Samples initial mean-field variational parameters (means and log standard deviations) and flattens them for optimization.

inputs.name: var_param_inits
inputs.constraints: Contains normal init specs for 'mean' and 'log_sd'.

inputs.name: rng_state_after_objective_init
inputs.constraints: Used as RNG source for initialization draws.

outputs.name: init_var_params_flat
outputs.constraints: Shape (2 * latent_dim,); row-stacked [means, log_sds].

outputs.name: rng_state_out
outputs.constraints: Represents RNG progression after variational init sampling.

nodes.type_signature: (flat_theta_template: jnp.ndarray, var_param_inits: dict[str, tuple[float, float]], rng_state_after_objective_init: int | PRNGKey-like RNG state) -> tuple[np.ndarray, int | PRNGKey-like RNG state]

nodes.name: optimize_variational_objective
nodes.description: Chooses optimizer backend by method name and minimizes the stochastic objective over flattened variational parameters.

inputs.name: objective_fun
inputs.constraints: Differentiable objective over flattened variational parameters.

inputs.name: opt_method
inputs.constraints: Uses Jacobian optimizer for 'L-BFGS-B'; otherwise HVP optimizer.

outputs.name: opt_result
outputs.constraints: Must expose optimized vector in .x.

nodes.type_signature: (objective_fun: callable, init_var_params_flat: np.ndarray, opt_method: str, verbose: bool) -> optimizer result object

nodes.name: decode_optimized_free_parameters
nodes.description: Splits optimized vector into mean and log-scale blocks, exponentiates scales, and reconstructs structured free parameters.

inputs.name: shape_summary
inputs.constraints: Used to map flat vectors back to parameter dicts.

outputs.name: free_means
outputs.constraints: Unconstrained posterior means in original parameter shapes.

outputs.name: free_sds
outputs.constraints: Positive unconstrained posterior standard deviations.

outputs.name: final_var_params_flat
outputs.constraints: Optimized flattened variational vector (same as opt_result.x).

nodes.type_signature: (opt_result: optimizer result object, shape_summary: flatten/reconstruct metadata) -> tuple[dict[str, jnp.ndarray], dict[str, jnp.ndarray], np.ndarray]

nodes.name: assemble_fit_artifacts
nodes.description: Packages optimized variational state and objective metadata into the base return payload.

outputs.name: fit_result_base
outputs.constraints: Contains free_means, free_sds, opt_result, objective_fun, shape_summary, final_var_params_flat.

nodes.type_signature: (free_means: dict[str, jnp.ndarray], free_sds: dict[str, jnp.ndarray], opt_result: optimizer result object, objective_fun: callable, shape_summary: flatten/reconstruct metadata, final_var_params_flat: np.ndarray) -> dict[str, Any]

nodes.name: attach_posterior_draws_if_requested
nodes.description: Conditionally augments the result payload with constrained posterior draws sampled from the fitted mean-field distribution.

inputs.name: constrain_fun_dict
inputs.constraints: Transforms unconstrained draws to constrained space.

inputs.name: n_draws
inputs.constraints: If None, no sampling is performed.

outputs.name: fit_result
outputs.constraints: Final return payload; may include 'draws'.

nodes.type_signature: (fit_result_base: dict[str, Any], free_means: dict[str, jnp.ndarray], free_sds: dict[str, jnp.ndarray], constrain_fun_dict: dict[str, callable], n_draws: int | None) -> dict[str, Any]

nodes.name: PosteriorDrawSampling
nodes.description: Samples from the fitted mean-field posterior using latent mean/scale state, applies constraint transforms, and optionally applies a post-processing function.

inputs.name: free_means
inputs.constraints: Latent mean state from variational fit.

inputs.name: free_sds
inputs.constraints: Latent scale state from variational fit; positive.

inputs.name: fun_to_apply
inputs.constraints: Optional pure transformation over sampled draws.

inputs.name: rng_state_in
inputs.constraints: Explicit stochastic input for reproducible sampling.

outputs.name: posterior_draws
outputs.constraints: Samples in constrained parameter space (or transformed output).

outputs.name: rng_state_out
outputs.constraints: Advanced RNG state returned as new immutable value.

nodes.type_signature: (free_means: dict[str, array], free_sds: dict[str, array], constrain_fun_dict: dict[str, callable], n_draws: int, fun_to_apply: callable | None, rng_state_in: int | PRNGKey-like RNG state) -> tuple[array | dict[str, array], int | PRNGKey-like RNG state]
nodes.conceptual_summary: FactorizedLatentDrawAndConstraintMap. Generates i.i.d. samples from a factorized latent distribution parameterized by coordinate-wise location and positive scale tensors, using an explicit pseudo-random state as input. Each sampled coordinate block is pushed through a corresponding constraint-enforcing transform to map from unconstrained latent space into a valid target manifold, then optionally composed with a user-supplied pure function. The random-state transition is returned as an explicit immutable output for reproducible state threading.. Applications: Robotics: sample feasible controller parameter tensors from latent uncertainty, then map to actuator-safe bounded domains before rollout evaluation., Computational materials: generate constrained microstructure parameter fields from a latent surrogate model for Monte Carlo property estimation., Communications engineering: draw latent channel-model coefficients and transform them to physically valid ranges for stochastic link simulation., Computational neuroscience: sample latent dynamical-system parameters and enforce stability/positivity constraints prior to neural population simulation.

nodes.name: SampleFreeSpacePosteriorDraws
nodes.description: Generate independent Gaussian draws for each latent parameter in unconstrained space, using parameter-wise mean/scale and preserving each parameter's original shape under a leading draw axis.

inputs.name: free_means
inputs.constraints: Keys define latent parameters; each value is the mean tensor.

inputs.name: free_sds
inputs.constraints: Must share keys/shapes with free_means; values are positive scales.

outputs.name: draws
outputs.constraints: For each key x: shape is (n_draws, *free_means[x].shape).

nodes.type_signature: (free_means: dict[str, np.ndarray], free_sds: dict[str, np.ndarray], n_draws: int) -> dict[str, np.ndarray]

nodes.name: CreatePerDrawConstraintAndPostprocessTransform
nodes.description: Construct a per-draw transform that first maps one unconstrained draw dict into constrained parameter space via apply_constraints, then computes the requested derived quantity via fun_to_apply.

inputs.name: fun_to_apply
inputs.constraints: Callable on constrained draw dict; identity by default.

outputs.name: per_draw_transform_fn
outputs.constraints: Maps cur_draw -> transformed result (array or dict).

nodes.name: VectorizeTransformOverAllDraws
nodes.description: Apply the per-draw transform across the draw axis with vmap to produce final posterior draws in constrained/derived space.

inputs.name: per_draw_transform_fn
inputs.constraints: Pure per-draw mapping from unconstrained draw dict to output representation.

outputs.name: posterior_draws
outputs.constraints: Structure depends on fun_to_apply output.

nodes.type_signature: (draws: dict[str, np.ndarray], per_draw_transform_fn: callable) -> np.ndarray | dict[str, np.ndarray]
